title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMPower
description: Facilities for generation and distribution of electrical power from OpenStreetMap tagged with power=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMPower

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier.

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification.

powerType.description: Property. The OSM power tag classifying the electrical feature. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:power'

voltage.description: Property. Operating voltage of the equipment in volts. Used directly for numbers, parses 'voltage' OSM tag. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:voltage'

cables.description: Property. Number of cables on a power line. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:cables'

operator.description: Property. The company or utility managing the power equipment.

line.description: Property. Type of power line within a substation. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:line'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
